title: Sales Manager Vacancy at Sunteck Realty - 2026 Batch

jsonLd.title: Sales Manager Vacancy at Sunteck Realty - 2026 Batch
jsonLd.description:
An exciting career opportunity awaits you at Sunteck Realty. We are on the lookout for a dedicated Sales Manager to strengthen our Vadodara-based team.

About Sunteck Realty:
Sunteck Realty is a leading organization in the Hybrid sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Prepare presentations and proposals for institutional clients
• Provide advisory services on property investment and market trends
• Coordinate with architects, contractors, and project teams
• Manage relationships with existing customers post-purchase
• Conduct site visits and property presentations for clients
• Conduct market research and provide competitive analysis
• Manage RERA documentation and compliance requirements

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• MBBS / MD / MS from recognized medical college
• 10-15 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in Financial Modeling
• Proficiency in Contract Management
• Proficiency in Sales Techniques
• Proficiency in GIS Tools
• Proficiency in Property Management
• Proficiency in RERA Compliance
• Proficiency in Negotiation Skills
• Proficiency in CRM Software

Work Mode: Hybrid - Flexible work-from-home and office

What We Offer:
• Transportation and conveyance allowance
• Annual performance appraisal
• Work-from-home flexibility
• Competitive salary with performance-linked incentives
• Flexible working hours
• Comprehensive health insurance for self and family
• Salary Range: 20 LPA - 40 LPA per annum

Location: Vadodara, Gujarat, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with Sunteck Realty!

educationRequirements.credentialCategory: MBBS / MD / MS from recognized medical college
